overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban commercial district. The player moves from covered arcades with neon-lit vending machines through open plazas and across streets, ending in a dark graffiti-covered underpass. The environment features dense cyberpunk architecture with holographic advertisements and mixed pedestrian traffic.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a semi-covered arcade area featuring prominent vending machines and a red storefront with neon signage. The player walks forward through the covered walkway, passing food stalls on the right while transitioning from an enclosed vending area toward a more open commercial corridor.

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered commercial corridor dominated by large neon signs including 'Spunky Monkey' and various holographic advertisements. The environment transitions from shaded cover to a sunlit open plaza with outdoor cafe seating. Concrete benches line the left side while food stalls operate on the right, with moderate pedestrian traffic moving in the same direction.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a bright sunlit plaza featuring the 'Brooklyn Barista' establishment and outdoor seating areas. The player crosses a red-paved street where an orange vintage car passes by, then approaches a building entrance with prominent 'TENOU' neon signage. The environment shifts from open sky to the entrance of a covered passageway.

brick wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
large illuminated advertisement screen visible through underpass opening

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dark, narrow covered underpass with graffiti-covered walls and exposed utility infrastructure overhead. The lighting shifts dramatically to artificial sources with red and blue structural beams visible. The player follows other pedestrians through this enclosed corridor while traffic continues on the visible road to the left, creating a contrast between the dark passage and the bright digital billboard visible at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit commercial arcade into a bright urban plaza before descending into a dark, gritty underpass. It begins in a semi-covered walkway passing vending machines and a red storefront, moving steadily forward as the enclosed space transitions into a commercial corridor dominated by holographic advertisements and signs for Spunky Monkey. As the camera emerges from the shade, the scene opens into a sunlit plaza featuring the Brooklyn Barista and outdoor seating, where the player crosses a red-paved street behind a passing orange vintage car. The environment then shifts from the open sky toward a building entrance marked by TENOU signage, leading the camera directly into a narrow, covered passageway. Finally, the lighting drops dramatically as the path becomes a graffiti-covered underpass with exposed utility pipes and red and blue structural beams, contrasting the dark corridor with a bright digital billboard visible in the distance.
